changelog: Cross-reference visualizer with call graph analysis and complexity metrics
Smart function naming with ML-based pattern recognition
Type library auto-detection for Windows and Linux platforms
Code bookmarking system with categories, tags, and notes
Advanced search with function similarity detection (Jaccard similarity)

Added IDA Pro and Binary Ninja tool wrappers for advanced decompilation features
Enhanced function analysis with cyclomatic complexity calculation

Total: 32 built-in skills + 9 external = 41 total skills available
